# ITQAAN

> ITQAAN is a creative agency that designs websites, brand identity, and graphic
> design for Muslim businesses in Dubai, across the UAE, and worldwide. Work is
> done the halal way: fixed pricing with no riba and no hidden fees, content that
> respects Islamic values, and full ownership of the finished site for the client.
> Services are delivered remotely. Prices are in AED and start from 997 AED.

## About

- Name: ITQAAN
- Type: Creative agency (web design, brand identity, graphic design, SEO)
- Serves: Muslim businesses in Dubai, the UAE, and worldwide
- Delivery: Remote (WhatsApp, email, screen shares)
- Values: Fixed price agreed upfront, no riba, no hidden fees, no music and no
  images of women by default, client owns everything on completion
- Website: https://withitqaan.com
- Contact: WhatsApp https://wa.me/923165252296, email hello@withitqaan.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/withitqaan

## Pricing (AED, fixed, agreed before work begins)

- One-page website: from 997 AED
- Multi-page business website: from 2,497 AED
- Online store: from 4,497 AED
- Web app / custom build: from 6,997 AED
- Logo only: from 797 AED
- Logo + essentials: from 1,497 AED
- Full brand system: from 2,997 AED
- One-time SEO setup: from 797 AED
- Monthly SEO & care: from 397 AED/month
- Monthly care plan: 147 AED/month
